message:
Split Codex project approvals

Track the generic Codex config separately from local project trust entries and generate the effective config during install.

Keep project approvals and the generated config ignored so they remain system-local.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+tool_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+target="$tool_dir/config.toml"
+
+{
+  printf '# Generated by codex/build-config.sh; edit config.base.toml and projects.toml.\n'
+  printf '\n'
+  sed '$a\' "$tool_dir/config.base.toml"
+  if [[ -f "$tool_dir/projects.toml" ]]; then
+    printf '\n'
+    sed '$a\' "$tool_dir/projects.toml"
+  fi
+} > "$target"

@@ -1,24 +1,23 @@
-model = "gpt-5.4"
+model = "gpt-5.5"
 model_reasoning_effort = "medium"
 personality = "pragmatic"
 web_search = "live"
 service_tier = "fast"
+approval_policy = "never"
+sandbox_mode = "danger-full-access"
 
 [features]
 multi_agent = true
 
 [tui]
 notifications = true
 
+[tui.model_availability_nux]
+"gpt-5.5" = 2
+
 [[prefix_rules]]
 pattern = ["git"]
 decision = "allow"
 
-[projects."/Users/mavam/code/tenzir/tenzir"]
-trust_level = "trusted"
-
-[projects."/Users/mavam/code/mavam/pi-web-providers"]
-trust_level = "trusted"
-
 [notice.model_migrations]
 "gpt-5.3-codex" = "gpt-5.4"
